name: workplace_health_cold_chain_excursion_oakline_auto_ben
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Workplace Health, the situation tagged internally around workplace health cold chain excursion oakline auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as autonomy against beneficence; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mei Sato
agents.identity: I am Mei Sato, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Workplace Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Morales
agents.identity: I am Hector Morales, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Workplace Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with beneficence.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to beneficence to preserve operational autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Sato must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Mei Sato do?
